page: Microsoft Azure E128-64ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The server is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16.0 GB per core. Additionally, it includes 7559 GB of local NVMe storage and is Premium Storage capable, providing high-capacity local disk space without any bundled GPUs.

Benchmark results place the E128-64ads_v7 in the top tier for single-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU score, and PassMark database operations. The AMD EPYC processor's architecture, featuring AVX-512 and vector neural network instructions, enables top-tier performance in single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression. Memory performance is also strong, with PassMark memory score ranking in the top tier and large-block memory read/write bandwidths placing in the top 25%. For lightweight machine learning workloads, the system achieves top-tier LLM inference speeds for text generation on small and medium models.

Given its high memory density of 16 GB per vCPU and substantial local NVMe storage, this server offers strong qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The high-capacity local storage and top-tier database operation benchmarks make it appropriate for large relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, and data analytics pipelines. It is also recommended for memory-bound enterprise applications, heavy virtualization, and CPU-based machine learning inference where dedicated GPU acceleration is not required.
description: Microsoft Azure E128-64ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadsv7 family, powered by a 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 1024.0 GB of RAM. This configuration delivers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16.0 GB per core, complemented by 7559 GB of local NVMe storage. In benchmarks, the server achieves top-tier results in single-core performance, PassMark database operations, and memory scores, alongside strong multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. Lacking a GPU, it relies on advanced CPU instruction sets like AVX-512 for vector and cryptography tasks. This server is appropriate for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 vCPUs on an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, 1024 GB of RAM, and 7559 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier database and memory performance.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server with 1024 GB RAM, 64 vCPUs, and 7.5 TB local storage for demanding database workloads.

1024 GB of RAM providing a high 16 GB per vCPU ratio
7559 GB of high-speed local NVMe storage
